wiki.summary: slayr talks about how he doesn’t want his partner to want everything he has and live his life and focus on her own. and that just because he has something doesn’t mean she needs it too. he also acknowledges that maybe he’s wrong and she likes the same things. “The Sky” by slayr was produced by slayr, waera, jackwya & 808toofly. slayr released “The Sky” on November 5, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
